title: Assertion triggered in make_persistent
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, value INT, name VARCHAR(50));
INSERT INTO test_table (id, value, name) VALUES (1, 3, 'test1');
INSERT INTO test_table (id, value, name) VALUES (2, 25, 'test2');
SELECT (SELECT value FROM test_table WHERE id = 1) + (SELECT value FROM test_table WHERE id = 2) AS total;
SELECT value FROM test_table WHERE value IS NULL OR value > 10;
key_bug_features: Assertion in make_persistent during select operation
